TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tongan i Nantou a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu tongan. u kasalumaluma' nu tongan sa, 278 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 952 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 841 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 111 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u kasabinacadan, Seediq71%, Tayal9%, Amis2%, Bunun3%, Paiwan1%, Truku1%, zumazuma1%. 1 ku cacudadan i tongan niyzau'. 1 ku pakincalan i tongan niyazu'. 1 ku kyukay i tongan niyzau'.
S.PHON: toŇčan i nantou a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu toŇčan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu toŇčan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, s…ô…ôdi***%, tajar~…ĺ*%, amis*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, truku*%, zumazuma*%. * ku ¶a ¶udadan i toŇčan nijzau Ē~ °. * ku pakin ¶ar~…ĺan i toŇčan nijazu Ē~ °. * ku kjukaj i toŇčan nijzau Ē~ °.
S.FORM: tongan i Nantou a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu tongan. u kasalumaluma' nu tongan sa, 278 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 952 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 841 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 111 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u kasabinacadan, Seediq71%, Tayal9%, Amis2%, Bunun3%, Paiwan1%, Truku1%, zumazuma1%. 1 ku cacudadan i tongan niyzau'. 1 ku pakincalan i tongan niyazu'. 1 ku kyukay i tongan niyzau'.
S.PHON: toŇčan i nantou a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu toŇčan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu toŇčan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, s…ô…ôdi***%, tajar~…ĺ*%, amis*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, truku*%, zumazuma*%. * ku ¶a ¶udadan i toŇčan nijzau Ē~ °. * ku pakin ¶ar~…ĺan i toŇčan nijazu Ē~ °. * ku kjukaj i toŇčan nijzau Ē~ °.
